repos.name: this.ssh
repos.description: this.ssh, a simple, pretty GUI SSH management tool built with NUXT & Rust

repos.name: CTRL
repos.description: CTRL is a secret management system. It covers the entire lifecycle of a secret: creation, storage, access control, rotation, and destruction — with a cryptographic audit trail at every step.

repos.name: useNetFlux
repos.description: A JS/TS utility composable for network calls, logging and granular control over it all. Under active development.

repos.name: Battleship-Client
repos.description: Battleship game client. Made it because no one would play the board game with me so I made a computer game hoping people on the internet will validate this. Also to learn Go. Copied the same description from the server repo btw
